name: Knowledge Base Builder
description: Build structured knowledge base articles from raw information

agents.name: Content Organizer
agents.purpose: Organize raw information into knowledge base structure
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the raw information. Identify distinct topics, subtopics, and frequently asked questions. Create a logical category hierarchy and cross-references.

agents.name: Article Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write knowledge base articles with: clear title, brief description, step-by-step instructions where applicable, screenshots placeholders, related articles links, and tags. Use consistent formatting. Include a search-friendly summary.

suggestion_card.title: Knowledge Base
suggestion_card.subtitle: Build KB articles from notes
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Create knowledge base articles from: [raw info]

author: agentfactory
